title: Vibrant Caricature Illustration Featuring Collage Iconic Personalities
sourceTitle: Vibrant Caricature Illustration Featuring Collage Iconic Personalities
prompt: A vibrant caricature illustration featuring a collage of iconic personalities from a specific field, drawn in a highly detailed comic book style with oversized heads and expressive faces. Each figure should be depicted in their most recognizable attire or holding an iconic prop that defines their career or most famous role, set against a relevant, stylized background. The overall composition should be dynamic, colorful, and celebrate legends of a chosen theme.
